message:
perf(bytes): #[inline] BytesMut BufMut impl + BytesCursor Buf impl + Bytes::as_slice

Add #[inline] to BytesMut's BufMut trait impl (remaining_mut, chunk_mut,
advance_mut, put_slice) and BytesCursor's Buf trait impl (remaining,
chunk, advance) plus Bytes::as_slice. These are the concrete impl
methods called through trait dispatch on every buffer operation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
